chunks.title: Immediate Steps
chunks.text: Move to higher ground immediately. Do not walk in moving water. Six inches of moving water can knock you down.

chunks.title: First Aid - Drowning
chunks.text: Lay person flat. Tilt head back. Give 2 rescue breaths. 30 compressions on chest. Repeat until help arrives.

chunks.title: Avoid Contaminated Water
chunks.text: Floodwater contains sewage and chemicals. Do not touch your face. Wash hands with clean water immediately.
